---
title: "2011-2013"
author: "Rishita Bonepalli"
date: "2026-02-21"
output: html_document
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(janitor)
```

# Assigning Excel Files
```{r}
data_2011 <- read_excel("cpsaat11b_2011.xlsx")
data_2012 <- read_excel("cpsaat11b_2012.xlsx")
data_2013 <- read_excel("cpsaat11b_2013.xlsx")
```

- Assigns 2011 11b data to data_2011 variable
- Assigns 2012 11b data to data_2012 variable
- Assigns 2013 11b data to data_2013 variable

# Testing
## Top 6 Rows
head(data_2011)
head(data_2012)
head(data_2013)

## Column Names
colnames(data_2011)
colnames(data_2012)
colnames(data_2013)

#Cleaning

## Column Names
```{r}
data_2011 <- data_2011 %>%
  clean_names()
data_2012 <- data_2012 %>%
  clean_names()
data_2012 <- data_2012 %>%
  clean_names()
```

colnames(data_2011)
colnames(data_2012)
colnames(data_2013)
